_comment: Community corrections — these override research data with verified info

Ponce._note: Brittany Ulrich (community member) commented on Facebook that our IG handle for Ponce's wife is wrong. Our research found her partner as Martina Ponce Soto-Aguilar (@maartinaponce) but this needs further verification. Current roster-override has Martina Madeo (@martu.madeop) which may be outdated.

Herrera._note: Divorced from Shantal Mayo in 2025 per TUDN and Soy Fútbol. Updated in roster-override.json.

Quiñónes._note: Had Fiorella Curutchet (Bouzat's wife) copy-pasted as his partner — this was a Sonar hallucination. Cleaned in roster-override.json.
